curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff. The patch adds a check for '..' in the request URI in the Download function (server/http_download.go) and strips all '.' characters from the user-supplied path form value in the upload function (server/http_upload.go). Both fixes address path traversal via unsanitized user input. The pre-assigned class 'path-traversal' matches the CWE IDs (CWE-22, CWE-24) and the patch behavior. Sibling HTTP handler files (http_remove.go, http_info.go) use r.FormValue("path") but were not patched and use the path for LevelDB lookups rather than direct filesystem access, so they are not included.
